# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public and private subnets, route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways for a microservices architecture

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
  PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24
  PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24
  AvailabilityZone1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::AvailabilityZone::Name
  AvailabilityZone2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::AvailabilityZone::Name
  NamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: microservices

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone1
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-public-az1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone2
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-public-az2'

  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone1
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-app-az1'

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone2
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-app-az2'

  PrivateDataSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone1
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-data-az1'

  PrivateDataSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone2
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-data-az2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-public-rt'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEip1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-nat-eip-az1'

  NatEip2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-nat-eip-az2'

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-nat-az1'

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-nat-az2'

  PrivateRouteTableAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-rt-az1'

  PrivateRouteTableAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${NamePrefix}-private-rt-az2'

  PrivateRouteAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRouteAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateDataSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

  PrivateDataSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  InternetGatewayId:
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateAppSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
  PrivateAppSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
  PrivateDataSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
  PrivateDataSubnet2Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PrivateRouteTableAz1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1
  PrivateRouteTableAz2Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2
  NatGateway1Id:
    Value: !Ref NatGateway1
  NatGateway2Id:
    Value: !Ref NatGateway2
